title: Geometry Preview Images Events
description: Events published by the Geometry Service for 6-side + isometric preview images

PreviewImagesGeneratedEvent.description: Published when 6-side preview images are generated for a 3D file

storagePath.description: Original 3D file storage path (used as join key with OrderFile)

previewImages.description: Preview images for 6 sides of the 3D model

frontSmall.description: GCS storage path to front preview WebP (small)

leftSmall.description: GCS storage path to left preview WebP (small)

rightSmall.description: GCS storage path to right preview WebP (small)

backSmall.description: GCS storage path to back preview WebP (small)

topSmall.description: GCS storage path to top preview WebP (small)

bottomSmall.description: GCS storage path to bottom preview WebP (small)

thumbnailSmall.description: GCS storage path to isometric thumbnail WebP (small, ~256px)

thumbnailLarge.description: GCS storage path to isometric thumbnail WebP (large, 1200px, hi-res fallback)

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when preview images were generated

failed.description: True when preview image generation failed; consumers should transition to Failed state
